headline: Baird Maintains Outperform on Zebra Technologies, Lowers Price Target to $300
summary: Baird  analyst Richard Eastman   maintains Zebra Technologies (NASDAQ:ZBRA) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $350 to $300.
